globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https:;
